productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Stripes Navy Blue Tshirts
description: Composition Navy blue polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has green, red and grey stripes, chambray spread collar, short sleeves, concealed buttoned chest placket, embroidered brand detailing on the upper left chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron directly on print/embroidery The green, red and grey stripes lend a preppy feel to this navy blue polo neck T-shirt from status quo. The embroidered brand detailing on the upper left chest enhances the brand image. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team this with jeans or chinos. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
